transcript.speaker: Bellwether
transcript.text: It is high summer in Bellwether: warm spells broken by cloud, rain or occasional thunderstorms.

transcript.speaker: Narrator
transcript.text: The bus leaves you at Bellwether just after nine in the morning.

transcript.speaker: Narrator
transcript.text: For now, there is only the road ahead and the key in your pocket.

transcript.text: You make your way to Village Road.
